title: oligoneuron rigidum var. glabratum
intro: Oligoneuron rigidum var. glabratum, also known as stiff goldenrod, is a perennial plant species native to the southeastern United States. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, infections, and various health conditions. The health benefits of oligoneuron rigidum var. glabratum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is used to make herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and salves, although the effectiveness and safety of these preparations have not been extensively scientifically studied.
